# Cross-link PR branch-constraint in pull-request-workflow.md

### Context
In PR #10832, we added a moment-of-decision constraint to the `sync_all` tool description requiring it to be run only on the `dev` branch.

### The Problem
To ensure symmetric authoring and tool-use discipline, this constraint should also be documented in our standard PR workflow guidelines.

### The Architectural Reality
`pull-request-workflow.md` (or `.agents/skills/pull-request/SKILL.md`) dictates how agents handle branches and PRs.

### The Fix
Add a cross-link or explicit mention of the `sync_all` branch constraint (`dev` only) to the relevant section of the pull-request skill/workflow documentation.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `pull-request-workflow.md` (or equivalent skill doc) includes the `sync_all` branch constraint.

### Out of Scope
Any functional changes to tools or other workflow processes.

Origin Session ID: 88a6ed3a-b1b9-461a-aaf3-7c9984bd12e7
